title: Ex-Syrian intelligence chief found guilty of torture and sexual abuse by Austrian court
summary_full: Two former Syrian officials went on trial in Vienna, Austria, accused of crimes against opponents of former Syrian leader Bashar al-Assad
summary_public: Two former Syrian officials went on trial in Vienna, Austria, accused of crimes against opponents of former Syrian leader Bashar al-Assad
